gpt55_review_summary: Franklin found two issues: generated benchmark plans could not self-bundle their final plan-execution sidecar under strict mode, and the generated-plan README example omitted/blurred strict release guidance. Resolved by keeping strict completeness on the direct release-bundle API/CLIs only and documenting the post-execution strict bundle step. Franklin re-reviewed and approved the revised diff as clean.
verification: poetry run pytest -q tests/test_release_bundle.py tests/test_benchmark_plan.py tests/test_project_governance.py -> 136 passed
poetry run python -m compileall -q src tests -> passed
what_changed: Added strict V1 release-bundle completeness validation for direct release publishing.
Threaded --require-complete-v1 through public and legacy release-bundle CLIs.
Documented the two-phase plan-execution then strict-bundle workflow.
why: Strict completeness should not let partial V1 release bundles look release-ready.
